description: A PI wants to purchase a piece of lab equipment using their grant funds.

nodes.task_description: Identify the PI, the grant account, and the details of the purchase (item, cost, vendor).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary purchasing information.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the purchase is allowable under the terms of the grant and that sufficient funds are available.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the equipment is an allowable expense and the grant has enough funds.

nodes.task_description: Submit a purchase requisition through the university's procurement system, charging it to the grant account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the purchase order.
